characters.name: Amanda Honeycutt
characters.description: Amanda HoneycuttGenderFemaleRelationship statusUnknownStatusAliveRelationshipsMichael Green (Ex-boyfriend)Charlie Green (Ex-boyfriend)Amanda Honeycuttwas Michael and Charlie's ex-girlfriend. She is talked about in Michael's love life- Michael Part - 6 Charlie Green (Ex-boyfriend) Back when they lived in Leesville, Michael had a girlfriend named Amanda Honeycutt. Often writing letters to her and singing about her. Eventually, she liked Charlie more than Michael. She eventually broke up with Michael and went out with Charlie, breaking Michael's heart.

characters.name: JC
characters.description: InfoboxJoshua Watson-GreenInformationNameJoshua Charles Watson-GreenDate of BirthApril 2, 2001Age24OccupationStudentLikesPlaying video games with his brothers,Michael's pranksDislikesGrandpa's rage,Grandpa's breakfast lasagna,Possibly his ex-girlfriendKaitlyn Conover,Charlie (for threatening him if he didn’t smoke or drink and assaulting his brothers)Doug West(for mentally abusing him and his brothers)NicknamesJC, Jay, Josh JC and his (Now Ex) Girlfriend Joshua Charles "JC/Jay" Green(born April 2, 2001) is one of the two overarching antagonists (alongside his uncleCharlie Green) ofTheAngryGrandpaShowand the first ofAngry Grandpa'sgrandchildren. He is the oldest son ofJennifer GreenandJoshua Watson. His three younger siblings areJimmy,JohnnyandJacob.
